data: {"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"{\"file\":\"handler.ts\",\"content\":\"import { run, step } from \\\"zttp:durable\\\";\\nimport { call } from \\\"zttp:workflow\\\";\\nimport type { Spec } from \\\"zttp:types\\\";\\n\\ntype WorkflowGuarantees = Spec<\\n    | \\\"deterministic\\\"\\n    | \\\"state_isolated\\\"\\n    | \\\"result_safe\\\"\\n    | \\\"optional_safe\\\"\\n    | \\\"no_secret_leakage\\\"\\n    | \\\"no_credential_leakage\\\"\\n    | \\\"input_validated\\\"\\n    | \\\"pii_contained\\\"\\n    | \\\"injection_safe\\\"\\n    | \\\"canonical\\\"\\n>;\\n\\nfunction handler(req: Request): Response & WorkflowGuarantees {\\n  const key = req.headers.get(\\\"idempotency-key\\\") ?? \\\"order-demo\\\";\\n  return run(key, () => {\\n    const reservation = step(\\\"reserve\\\", () => ({ reserved: true }));\\n    const notify = call(\\\"notify\\\", { method: \\\"POST\\\", path: \\\"/notify\\\", body: reservation });\\n    return Response.json({ ok: true, notifyStatus: notify.status });\\n  });\\n}\\n\"}"}}
